why_them: Website bears a 1985-2026 copyright and has early-2000s aesthetics with zero Rightmove/Zoopla integration and no mobile-responsive framework — arguably the most visually outdated independent agency in D&G. They are the dominant independent agent for all of Wigtownshire, listing on Rightmove and OnTheMarket, which signals established volume and fee income. A full rebuild with portal feed, SSL uplift, and online valuation would give them a competitive leap.
recommended_service: Full website rebuild with Rightmove/Zoopla property feed integration, SSL, online valuation widget, and mobile-first responsive design

why_them: Dedicated sales and lettings agency with a website that visually belongs to the early-2000s: static HTML layout, non-responsive, no portal integration, no valuation tool. They cover a wide lettings territory across Wigtownshire and have 20+ years in the lettings market. As a pure estate/lettings agency, digital presence is core to their lead generation.
recommended_service: Full website rebuild with lettings management portal integration, online valuation, mobile-responsive design, and SEO for Newton Stewart/Wigtownshire keywords

business_name: JB Graham Rural & Residential Estate Agents
why_them: The website has an expired SSL certificate — a critical trust and security failure that browsers flag with a red-screen warning, actively driving potential clients away. As a rural and residential specialist in Wigtownshire with 20+ years trading, the expired SSL alone is an urgent conversation starter.
recommended_service: Emergency SSL renewal, full site rebuild with Rightmove integration, mobile-responsive design, and mortgage broker services landing page
source: Google search for Stranraer estate agents, SSL failure confirmed

why_them: Solicitor/estate agents with a dated early-2010s website design despite listing 45 properties in the past 6 months — one of the more active agents in Castle Douglas/DG7. Their site has a Zoopla-powered instant online valuation widget but the surrounding design is visually outdated. A design refresh with integrated property search and modern UX would modernise the client-facing experience.
recommended_service: Website redesign/refresh retaining Zoopla valuation integration, modern responsive layout, improved property search UX, and local SEO for Castle Douglas

why_them: Solicitors and estate agents in Lockerbie with a mid-2010s website: no online valuation, no embedded property search, and only logos linking to Zoopla/PrimeLocation rather than a live feed. They are the main independent agent for Lockerbie and the Annandale corridor. The lack of any automated lead-capture tools means they are likely losing enquiries to better-digitised competitors.
recommended_service: Website redesign with embedded property search, online valuation tool, Zoopla/Rightmove feed integration, and mobile UX improvement

why_them: Over-100-year-old solicitor/estate agent with a functional but dated WordPress site: no Rightmove/Zoopla integration, no online valuation, and basic design. Their Facebook page is used for live property updates suggesting awareness of the need for digital engagement but lacking a coherent web strategy. Also owns AM Simpson & Son in Moffat, giving them two-location reach.
recommended_service: Website redesign with property portal integration, online valuation tool, lettings section, and a combined digital strategy covering both Lockerbie and Moffat offices

why_them: The only solicitor/estate agent in Moffat with a 120-year history. The website was built on a 2016 template and has not been meaningfully updated since: no portal integration, no valuation tool, no email address on the homepage. Moffat attracts second-home buyers and holiday let investors — a modern website with lettings and short-let sections would directly generate new revenue lines.
recommended_service: Full website rebuild with holiday let/short-let management landing page, online valuation, and local SEO targeting second-home buyers in Moffat

why_them: Founded in 1782, this Dumfries solicitor/estate agent has a dated WordPress site with no Rightmove/Zoopla integration, no online valuation, and properties self-listed without portal syndication. Their longevity and central Dumfries location suggests strong fee income, but the conservative digital presence means they are essentially invisible to digitally-native house hunters.
recommended_service: Website redesign with OnTheMarket/Zoopla property feed, online valuation, and SEO targeting Dumfries property buyers and landlords

why_them: One of the largest solicitor/estate agencies in Dumfries with a custom WordPress theme last designed around 2019. They have a valuation request form but no automated valuation tool, and no portal integration — properties are self-hosted. As a full-service firm listing across DG1/DG2/DG5, they have the budget and client volume to justify a professional upgrade.
recommended_service: Website redesign with automated valuation tool, Rightmove listing integration, and improved enquiry UX

why_them: One of the largest law firms in South West Scotland, active in both sales and lettings across DG1/DG2/DG11. Their site is functional but dated, with no Rightmove/Zoopla integration and a self-hosted property database. Given their scale, a dedicated property microsite or full property section redesign would sharpen their market positioning.
recommended_service: Property section redesign with embedded Zoopla listing feed, online valuation, lettings management landing page, and local SEO

why_them: Established in 1865 with offices in Thornhill and Sanquhar, covering Upper Nithsdale. Basic WordPress with no portal integration, no valuation tool, and a mid-2010s design. They serve a rural market with strong farm and land transaction volume. A modernised site with rural property sections and valuation tool would be strongly differentiated against their direct Thornhill competitor.
recommended_service: Website redesign with rural/residential property search, online valuation, ESPC/Zoopla integration, and two-office navigation structure

why_them: Solicitors and estate agents founded 1847 with a mid-2010s website: no Rightmove/Zoopla integration, self-hosted property database, and no online valuation tool. ESPC membership gives them reach but the site itself doesn't leverage this. Based centrally in Dumfries with coverage across DG1/DG2/DG5, they have a steady listing flow and the fee income to support a digital upgrade.
recommended_service: Website redesign with ESPC/Zoopla listing integration, online valuation tool, and mobile-optimised property search

why_them: The main site has a modern Neve/Elementor design, but their property listings are offloaded to a separate subdomain, creating a disjointed user experience and likely harming SEO. No Rightmove/Zoopla integration or online valuation tool. Consolidating the property section into one coherent site with portal integration would fix an obvious structural weakness.
recommended_service: Property section consolidation into main site, Zoopla/OnTheMarket feed integration, online valuation, and unified SEO strategy

why_them: Three-office solicitor/estate agent (Newton Stewart, Dumfries, Stranraer) on a modern RealHomes WordPress theme with Zoopla listings. However, no online valuation tool, and the template-based design lacks brand distinction for a firm spanning three D&G towns. A bespoke rebrand would set them apart from generic RealHomes sites.
recommended_service: Bespoke rebrand and website upgrade with automated valuation, improved three-office navigation, and local SEO across Wigtownshire and Dumfries

why_them: Small family-run solicitor/estate agent in Kirkcudbright on a modern Houzez theme with Zoopla, OnTheMarket, and ESPC integration. Website is in relatively good shape. The gap is the absence of an online valuation tool and limited brand differentiation. A valuation widget and holiday let section for the Kirkcudbright tourist market would add clear value.
recommended_service: Online valuation tool, holiday let/short-let landing page, and local SEO targeting Kirkcudbright property buyers and second-home owners

why_them: Solicitor/estate agent in Annan with a modern Avada/WordPress site that links to both Rightmove and Zoopla. Main weakness is no online valuation tool and relatively thin content for the lettings side. As Annan appeals to commuter buyers from Carlisle, a dedicated valuation and lettings management page targeting landlords would be a targeted addition.
recommended_service: Online valuation tool, landlord-focused lettings landing page, and estate agent SEO for Annan and Annandale corridor
